name: Wetterstation
Notification Filter
Open OneDrive
format:
<script>
    (function(scope) {
        // Wir warten auf eine Nachricht vom Switch-Node
        scope.$watch('msg', function(msg) {
            if (msg && msg.payload === 'open_onedrive') {
                // Öffnet OneDrive in einem neuen Tab
                window.open('https://1drv.ms/f/c/54f060033ca19c5a/IgD_EQuci1MmTLy015yBOq92AWz28srRaXnke9Jxk7MkuJI?e=OJTccC', '_blank');
            }
        });
    })(this);
</script>

name: Open Local Disk
format:
<script>
    (function(scope) {
        scope.$watch('msg', function(msg) {
            if (msg && msg.payload === 'open_local') {
                // Korrigierter Aufruf:
                window.open('http://192.168.2.50:8090', '_blank');
            }
        });
    })(this);
</script>
